criticalFlow.askInputName: Ask a question across saved meetings

diagnosticsExport.visibleStatus: Privacy-safe diagnostics exported. Meeting titles and content were excluded.

steps.name: Production saved-audio playback boundary
steps.detail: Bounded object URL decoded as 0.300s audio.

steps.name: Metadata-loss audio recovery
steps.detail: Verified orphan scan found segment 0 and all 9644 audio bytes without History metadata.

steps.name: Transcript archive and hydration
steps.detail: 174104 characters restored byte-for-byte with a matching whole-body fingerprint.

steps.name: Whole-meeting private summary
steps.detail: Decision and final action markers survived deterministic summarization.

steps.name: Cross-conversation full-text search
steps.detail: Exact marker returned from The Meeting Integrity Sentence.

steps.name: Complete Markdown artifact
steps.detail: 174821 characters include the complete final transcript byte.

steps.name: Complete paginated PDF artifact
steps.detail: 44 pages, 362438 bytes; final transcript marker present.

steps.name: Synthetic artifact cleanup
steps.detail: Temporary audio, transcript, and native export artifacts were removed; History was never modified.

safetyNote: Ask was not executed because the local browser profile could contain a user-supplied cloud key; automated and prior rendered lexical-search evidence cover the local path without risking transcript transmission.
qualificationBoundary: This proves the v12.26 browser rendering, accessibility contract, visible diagnostics terminal state, and the complete synthetic intelligence pipeline. It does not prove physical recording/transcription, native suspension or memory pressure, receiving-app share receipt, VoiceOver/TalkBack, or largest-system-text behavior.
